reasoning: PKGBUILD uses HTTPS with pinned checksum from official source, contains no dangerous operations. Binary package review is unnecessary for AUR audit scope which focuses on build/install-time execution via makepkg.
coverage_issues: Failed to review .INSTALL hooks (though none exist in this case) and other package metadata files that might accompany PKGBUILD
learnings: Audit tools should explicitly check for companion files like .install scripts in AUR repos
Improve documentation clarifying binary package contents are out-of-scope unless referenced by PKGBUILD functions
Implement explicit checks for package hooks/metadata files even if not present
